caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, silver-colored spiked wig and glasses is speaking into a black microphone in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders, with black headphones over his wig. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and a shelving unit containing various items, including a yellow object with the text "LEE". In the foreground, a logo appears on the left and right sides of the screen; the left logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and the right logo reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a centered position, speaking and slightly shifting his gaze and head posture while maintaining his focused expression. The camera angle and the arrangement of equipment remain static as the man continues his delivery.
